programme.title: Zila Ghaziabad
programme.desc: A gang war erupts between corrupt chairman Brahampal and gangster Fauji. Betrayal and shifting loyalties escalate the conflict, plunging the village into chaos and violence as personal vendettas drive the characters towards an uncertain future.

programme.title: Gali_Gali_Chor_hai_FUM_Stereo_HIN_HD
programme.desc: Bharat, a small-time artist, finds himself dealing with the effects of a corrupt system. In the process, he himself discovers his ideals and decides to fight for the rights of the common people.

programme.title: Bluffmaster
programme.desc: Ace con artist Roy leads a double life, convincing his girlfriend Simmi he is an ordinary, honest guy. However, when she discovers the truth, he is powerless to save their relationship. After collapsing on the street, Roy discovers he has a brain tumour and hasn't long to live. Before it is too late, his partner and disciple Dittu persuades Roy to take part in one last master plan.

programme.title: Brahmachari
programme.desc: Abandoned as a child, Brahmachari lives in a mortgaged house with twelve young orphans he saves a woman from dying and she changes his life forever but first she has to deal with her own affairs.

programme.title: Andar Bahar
programme.desc: A Police Inspector, Ravi, has been assigned the task of apprehending notorious gangster, Shera, who, however, proves to be too elusive for him. Ravi then seeks the assistance of another gangster, Raja, who is doing time in prison. Released in the custody of Ravi, who doesn't know that Raja has his own agenda behind this so-called co-operation.

programme.title: Mili
programme.desc: Curmudgeonly Shekhar (Amitabh Bachchan) is new to the block, and it doesn't take long before the street noise, as well as the children playing nearby, push his tolerance to the limit. To the rescue comes Mili (Suresh Chatwal), who has the exact opposite disposition. While Shekhar may be at a loss over what to do with her at first, he eventually falls in love. Unfortunately, when the time comes to ask for her hand, he finds out Mili has a fatal medical condition and only has a few weeks to live.

programme.title: Surya 420
programme.desc: A transgender man struggles to realise his sexual orientation while dealing with the social stigma and taboo related to gender transition in the society.

programme.title: Maha Roudram
programme.desc: South Station

programme.title: Jaal Ek Tantra
programme.desc: South Station

programme.title: Nani
programme.desc: South Station

programme.title: Dangerous Ishq
programme.desc: A supermodel experiences visions of her past lives while trying to save her kidnapped boyfriend.

programme.title: Dum
programme.desc: When a diligent aspiring policeman named Uday realises that his superior is a corrupt man, he takes it upon himself to fight corruption, so even if it means putting at risk his life and his dream of becoming an officer.

programme.title: Masti
programme.desc: Three henpecked friends tired of their respective marriage decide to spice up their lives by indulging in an extramarital affair. But things go downhill very quickly when they become the prime suspects in a deadly murder case.

programme.title: Anita
programme.desc: After his ex-fiancée's mysterious suicide, a man searches for answers—only to be haunted by her everywhere he goes.

programme.title: Paappi Devataa
programme.desc: Paapi Devata (1995) action film: After avenging his sister's assault, Rahim is trapped in deceit as DCP Ram investigates.

programme.title: Adharm
programme.desc: Jaggan's betrayal shatters the Verma family, and Avinash with brother Vicky seek revenge.

programme.title: City of Vultures 2
programme.desc: A gangster makes moves to take over the Southside of Chicago, but the police are closing in as street violence escalates to devastating levels.

programme.title: City of Vultures 3
programme.desc: Richard joins in the drug trade, as advocates for reform urge him to change. G attempts to raise his son on Chicago's violent south side.

programme.title: A Gun for Jennifer
programme.desc: A woman comes to New York City from Ohio to escape an abusive husband and gets entangled with murderous female vigilantes who prey on abusive men.

programme.title: A Shot In The Dark
programme.desc: A baby is kidnapped in a Brazilian airport. Years later, the mother lives in Lisbon and works in a strip-tease bar so she can survive. When she is fired, she joins a gang of bank robbers...

programme.title: Alien Rising
programme.desc: A savvy ex-homeland security agent and martial arts expert is forced to a remote island to help the military unlock the secrets of an extraterrestrial technology.

programme.title: EMI Liya Hai To Chukana Padega
programme.desc: A film that tells the story of a group of people who fall prey to credit card debt and are struggling to repay their loans. They come together to form a support group and devise a plan to fight against the corrupt practices of the credit card companies. The movie highlights the consequences of reckless spending and the importance of financial literacy in an engaging and thought-provoking plot.

programme.title: Suhaag
programme.desc: Best friends Ajay and Raj are goofy college-going boys, who love playing pranks on others. Ajay's life turns upside down after he finds out about a tragic incident related to his estranged father, which might put his friendship with Raj at stake.

programme.title: Krishna Cottage
programme.desc: The movie revolves around a group of college students who visit a haunted house called "Krishna Cottage." As they unravel the mystery behind the house, they uncover dark secrets and a vengeful spirit that haunts them

programme.title: Dost
programme.desc: Two brothers reunite in order to fulfil the wish of their dying father whom Thakur bitterly humiliates and murders. They intend to marry Thakur's two daughters to seek revenge.

programme.title: Pineville Heist
programme.desc: On a routine walk in the woods, a high schooler stumbles into the aftermath of a bank robbery gone wrong. He soon finds himself locked within the schoolgrounds, desperate to keep himself and his teacher alive as one of the psychotic thieves hunts them down.

programme.title: Terror Of Hallow'S Eve
programme.desc: After a fifteen-year-old is brutally beaten up by High School bullies, his wish for revenge unknowingly unleashes the Terror of Halloween.

programme.title: The Landlord
programme.desc: Alyssa moves into a luxury apartment complex but is unaware she is being watched by her disturbed landlord, Robert, via hidden cameras. Robert will do anything to fill the void left by his estranged daughter--even if that means replacing her.

programme.title: Prodigy
programme.desc: A mother concerned about her young son's disturbing behavior thinks something supernatural may be affecting him.

programme.title: The Duplicate
programme.desc: When Jessica asks her twin sister Alessandra for help with a blackmailer she gets more than she bargained for.

programme.title: BUSTED KNUCKLE
programme.desc: Kim and Doug want to drive her father's hyper-rare 1959 Thunderbolt, but the car was only set up for the racetrack. Batalla is a legendary motorcycle builder who asks Dan to restore his prized possession - a 1947 Knucklehead.

programme.title: MILL RACE MONSTER, TOXIC RAIN AND DEVIL DOGS
programme.desc: In Columbus, Indiana, a swamp beast's attacks spark the largest monster hunt in U.S. history, while bizarre gel-like rain sickens a town, and Devil Dogs guard a cursed island.

programme.title: KIT CAR CHAOS
programme.desc: Bob spent years working on his beloved 1969 K20 Truck, but he needs FantomWorks to solve the mysteries within. Dan's brother-in-law John shows up with a 1962 Ferrari kit car that looks hot, but the wiring could burn it to the ground.

programme.title: I'm LIVE Ep.307
programme.desc: In this episode, FRankly performs “TR,” “Grow Up!,” “DD (Drunk Dreaming,” “Help me,” and their latest single “Novel.”FRankly is made up of vocalist and guitarist Jung Seung-Hwan, guitarist Na Hyung-chul, drummer Ato, and bassist Koo Dong-uk. Deeply inspired by the 2000s Brit pop and American alternative rock, their music encapsulates authentic retro sentiments. However, they also display their trademark, youthful energy in many other elements of their musical work, such as album covers and song descriptions, making everyone fall for their kaleidoscopic qualities.

programme.title: I'm LIVE Ep.308
programme.desc: BAND NAH is comprised of guitarist and vocalist Nah Sang-hyun, drummer Kang Hyun-woong, and bassist PAIIEK. This 88io debuted in 2015 with the EP, “Tingling,” and has released about 90 songs since then. Impressively enough, their music is as diverse as it is prolific. They have been evolving in unpredictable ways every time while maintaining their delightful spirit - no wonder why they are highly sought after for concerts and festivals.In this episode, BAND NAH performs “Shine,” which they released early this year, “Love Love Love,” Spotlight“ featured on the sound88ack of ”Yumi's Cells,“ ”88,“ and ”1+1“ to showcase the essence of their musicality.

programme.title: I'm LIVE Ep.310
programme.desc: In this episode, Isaac Hong X Sooyoung Chin performs their songs “(n)everland,” “a bird,” “pages,” and also Hong's own pieces “Rain” and “Stay.”Isaac Hong made himself known to the public with his Yoo Jae-ha Music Contest-winning self-written song “Spring” in 2013. Since then, he has steadily built up his own musical world, marked by his trademark, mellow vocals and delicate sentiments. This time, he collaborated with renowned jazz pianist Sooyoung Chin to drop their project album, “Everland.” It is a mostly English-language album made through months of full collaboration, and the two describe it as “a record of their conversations over piano.” Using the common language of music, the two expanded their reach into each other's respective universes. Joining us on this week's episode of I'm LIVE is Isaac Hong X Sooyoung Chin!Tune in to I'm LIVE and join their beautiful jazzy conversation!

programme.title: Shrimaan Shrimati
programme.desc: Keshav lusts after glamorous Prema, while neighbour Dilruba eyes homely Kokila. Follows their misadventures in trying to get closer to each other's wives.

programme.title: Laal Banarasi
programme.desc: The story highlights the exploitation happening with the ‘Bunkars' in Banaras, whose craft is appreciated all around the world, but they are paid peanuts by the traders. Amidst this, blooms a love story between the two opposites - Gauri, a bunkar and Garv, a trader. The story is of Gauri who belongs to the bunkar community facing series of incidents which destroys her family and swears to bring about a change in their life and stop the exploitation by directly trading the sarees. This becomes a battle with traders creating hurdles in her life but she is unstoppable.

programme.title: Agni Vayu
programme.desc: Agni Vayu Is A Romantic Thriller That Tells The Story Of A Young, Vibrant Dr. Agni And An Ambitious Investment Banker Vayu. As Their Love Blossoms, An Unfortunate Turn Of Events Happens That Throws Them Amid Conspiracy, Misunderstanding, Swindling, And All Sorts Of Paradoxes At Every Turn. They Set Out On A Journey To Unravel The Mystery Surrounding These Events. Can They Both Solve It Together And Will They Disclose Their Feelings To Each Other During The Journey.

programme.title: Dahej Daasi
programme.desc: This story is about a 19yr old girl named Chunari, who dreams of marriage and a happy family. However, she becomes entangled in the chains of deceit, finding herself on the path to becoming a Dahej Dasi, which is a tradition still prevalent in the backward regions of Rajasthan. The show unfolds into a compelling drama of tradition versus rebellion, love versus oppression.

programme.title: Maata Ki Mahima
programme.desc: In the divine saga inspired by Bhakt Prahlad, witness the journey of Mahima, a devout disciple of Maata, as she challenges the tyranny of Indrayani, whose sins overflow in a reign of oppression. Sent into the heart of Indrayani's lineage, Mahima embodies the triumph of faith over darkness, destined to end the era of tyranny and usher in an era of righteousness.

programme.title: Bhabhi Ke Pyare Pritam Hamare
programme.desc: Bhabhi Ke Pyare Pritam Humaare Is A Light-Hearted Celebrity Chat Show Hosted By One Of India'S Most Famous Rj– Pritam Singh. In Each Episode, He Will Welcome Top Female Celebrities From The Entertainment Industry Who Have Played The Roles Of Bhabhi'S & Bahu'S On-Screen, Adding A Pinch Of Glamour To The Show. These Female Celebrities Will Talk About Their Real-World, Tell Their Untold Stories And Reveal How They Live Off-Camera. What'S More? The Episodes Of This Chat Show Will Have An Enthralling Line-Up Of Gag Artists, Activities/Games & Comedy Segments, Along With The Barrel Of Laughs – Pritam.

programme.title: Paapnaashini Ganga
programme.desc: Paapnaashini Ganga Is A Mythological Show Based On The Life Of Goddess Ganga. The Show Takes The Viewers On The Journey Of Birth And Life Of Ganga. The Reason Behind Ganga'S Birth Was To Destruct Evil Entities. The Powers Of Adishakti Made Mainavati Give Birth To A Female Child Who Became Known As Ganga. Devatas Considered Ganga'S Purity As A Weapon Which Could Destroy Evil Asuras. As A Humble & Virtuous Woman, Ganga'S Entire Life Was Full Of Hardships, Which She Led Washing Away The Sins Of All Of Humanity Without Any Discrimination. Ganga Had Sacrificed All Her Desires On The Altar Of Dharma And Led A Divine Life Full Of Welfare Of Humanity. The Show Is Visually Appealing With Strong Vfx Which Will Enhance The Viewers Experience.

programme.title: Yam Kisi Se Kam Nahin
programme.desc: A misfit, a God, a husband, and a breadwinner, Yamraj is a common man with a fancy job title. He tries his best to give his family what they need and manages to make a mess of everything in the bargain. Lovable and goofy, this God of Death is anything but grim. Join our hardworking but hen-pecked Yamraj, his beloved buffalo and his motely family and friends in a slice-of-life sitcom to find out how the cookie really crumbles!

programme.title: Crime Files
programme.desc: It All Begins Around Us This Crime Show Explores Crimes That Occur Within Our Own Communities And Among People We Know. It Tells The Compelling Stories Of Ordinary Lives Disrupted By Crime, With Relatable Characters Representing The World Around Us. The Show'S Mission Is To Raise Awareness About Crime Prevention While Keeping Viewers Engaged And Intrigued."

programme.title: Daily Video
programme.desc: The Delhi Gymkhana Club, a British-era club in Lutyens' Delhi, has received a government notice to vacate its 27.3-acre land by June 5. We also explore what makes this club so exclusive that even today it has a long waiting list for membership.

programme.title: Daily Video
programme.desc: A heartbreaking case from Jaipur where a woman named Anu Meena lost her life after years of dowry harassment and assault by her husband, an Executive Engineer. Months later, her family found shocking CCTV and phone videos revealing the horrific abuse she endured behind closed doors.

programme.title: Netanagri
programme.desc: In the second segment of NetaNagari, Kuldeep Mishra discusses the controversy over the question asked to PM Narendra Modi in Norway. The debate covers why PM Modi avoids press conference questions and whether the Norwegian journalist asked the question just to go viral.

programme.title: GITN
programme.desc: In this special Guest In The Newsroom episode, celebrated folk singer Malini Awasthi joins us for a heartfelt conversation on music, culture, politics, and life. programme.title: Kitabwala
programme.desc: In this special episode of Kitaabwala, author Kushal Mehra joins Kuldeep Mishra for a sharp conversation about his book "Blasphemy." They explore religion, atheism, conversion, truth claims, and whether sacred ideas should be questioned.

programme.title: Netanagri
programme.desc: In the third segment of NetaNagari, Kuldeep Mishra discusses India's economy, rising inflation, and increasing petrol-diesel prices. The debate focuses on whether delays in economic decisions and election politics have made the situation more serious for the coming days.

programme.title: Sciencekaari
programme.desc: Aasan Bhasha Mein | in this episode, we explain why uranium enrichment is at the center of conflicts involving Iran, the US and Israel. From uranium mining in India to how nuclear bombs work, understand the science in simple language.

programme.title: Ground Report
programme.desc: Meerut, renowned for its gold trade, is facing a business decline after Prime Minister Modi's recent appeal. The Lallantop spoke with local traders and artisans who say orders have dwindled and they are now worried about their livelihoods.

programme.title: The Lallantop
programme.desc: In today's Lallan Top show, Kuldeep discusses the fourth petrol-diesel price hike in 10 days, and whether oil companies are now running at a loss. Also covered: BJD Rajya Sabha member resigns, three AIADMK MLAs join TVK, and Supreme Court slams NTA over NEET paper leak.

programme.title: Duniyadari
programme.desc: In this episode of Duniyadari, get the latest on the US-Iran peace deal as talks progress but Trump says he's not rushing. Also covered: Marco Rubio calls India a top strategic ally, and Russia uses its hypersonic Oreshnik missile again in Ukraine.

programme.title: kharcha Paani
programme.desc: Petrol in Delhi crosses ₹102 per litre as global oil prices surge. In this episode of Kharcha Paani, Shruti explains why even a possible US-Iran deal and reopening of the Strait of Hormuz may not bring immediate relief—and why fuel prices could stay high for months or even years.

programme.title: Social List

programme.title: Kill me, Heal me Ep.1
programme.desc: Do Hyun realizes that another personality exists within him and comes to understand that it's “multiple personality disorder.” Tae Im brings Do Hyun back to Korea to protect the family's control over the company. Meanwhile, Ri Jin searches for her missing patient, Heo Sook Hee, at Club Paradise, where she unexpectedly runs into Do Hyun — but he seems like a completely different person.

programme.title: Kill me, Heal me Ep.2
programme.desc: Ri Jin is startled by Se Gi's completely different demeanor from Do Hyun's, but when he gets hurt during a sudden fight, she rushes him to the hospital. Ho Pil encounters Se Gi, mistaking him for Do Hyun. Meanwhile, Do Hyun decides to stay in Korea and join the battle for the successor position at Seung Jin Group. But after receiving a call that Ri Jin is being threatened by bikers, he tries to summon another personality.

programme.title: Kill me, Heal me Ep.3
programme.desc: Perry Park rushes to the scene despite warnings when he hears that a woman has been kidnapped by bikers. Ri Jin closely observes Do Hyun's completely changed demeanor. Do Hyun later attends the Seung Jin Group board meeting and is officially appointed vice president, but Tae Im slaps him in anger for being late.

programme.title: Kill me, Heal me Ep.4
programme.desc: A new personality appears in Do Hyun — this time, that of a young child — leaving him shocked. Meanwhile, Se Gi drags Ri Jin off to somewhere unknown.

programme.title: Kill me, Heal me Ep.5
programme.desc: Se Gi, who has kidnapped Ri Jin, asks her to make Do Hyun disappear forever. Director Ahn begins tracking their whereabouts. Meanwhile, Do Hyun ends up at Ri On's house, and Ri On introduces him to his family as “Mr. Perry.”

programme.title: Kill me, Heal me Ep.6
programme.desc: Do Hyun can't stop thinking about Ri Jin, which only fuels Se Gi's jealousy. Eventually, Se Gi warns him, “If you touch my woman, yours will be in danger.” Provoked, Do Hyun goes to Ri Jin and asks her to become his secret personal doctor.

programme.title: Bablu Dablu Shrunk
programme.desc: This series follows Lakha, Bablu and Dablu on brand-new wild adventures. Pine Tree Mountain has become a preserve that draws visitors from all around to see its natural beauty and wildlife. This wildlife now includes some new but familiar residents: Hugo and friends from the hit movie, The Big Top Secret!

programme.title: Cindrella
programme.desc: Young Cinderella, struggling with abuse from her stepmother and stepsisters, receives help from her fairy godmother and animal friends while finding adventure and romance with a dashing man who hides the fact that he is a prince.

programme.title: Bablu Dablu Monster Paln
programme.desc: The crazy scientist, Doctor Rex Vector, and his hamster assistant, Mister Pete, return to Pine Tree Mountain with Vector's new, evil invention: a robo-monster complete with animal abilities. But first, Vector needs to collect these skills. He comes up with a power absorbing gadget, which he often disguises, in order to trap and steal abilities from the innocent animals. Vick, Briar and Bramble, along with other animal friends, must stand up against this “monster plan” of Vector's. It's going to be a fierce fight between wild animals and poaching villains.

programme.title: Bablu Dablu-Spring Into Action
programme.desc: The forest animals love trees, flowers and spring. So it's up to the bear brothers to stop Logger Vick from chopping down every tree.

programme.title: Bablu Dablu
programme.desc: This series follows Lakha, Bablu and Dablu on brand-new wildadventures. Pine Tree Mountain has become a preserve that drawsvisitors from all around to see its natural beauty and wildlife.

programme.title: Fury Spinner
programme.desc: After decades of development, Fury Spinner duel has become one of the most popular sports in the world. At this time, the "Ultimate Feast" Invitational Tournament of Fury Spinner began. The protagonist Meteo is invited to the mysterious island together with other top players in the world to embark on a survival adventure. During the adventure, Meteo not only relied on his determination to protect the weak and gained recognition to unlock the power of the sacred beast, but also got acquainted with the hidden master Kim who came here to find his brother and Joll who wanted to prove as the “perfect warrior” to his father. However, this "Ultimate Feast" tournament is just a conspiracy of the organizer Kenji! He wants to use the players to awaken the evil forces in the island to destroy the world! Meteo and friends stepped forward and tried their best to defeat Kenji.

programme.title: VIP Pets
programme.desc: We are the VIP Pets! The coolest pets with a passion for hair! We are best friends and together we will discover lots of beautiful hairstyles and go on exciting adventures!

programme.title: Om Nom Stories
programme.desc: Sweet tooth Om Nom is wandering Around the world, eats a lot of candies and tries to find his Dream job. Watch his adventures and solve different puzzles on the way!

programme.title: Chefclub Kids
programme.desc: With Chefclub Kids, the little ones get their hands dirty all while having fun in the kitchen. Whether they' re learning to prepare dinner, bake goodies, or explore new flavors, Chefclub Kids is a way for children to gain confidence through cooking!

programme.title: Ryan Defrates
programme.desc: The Adventures of Ryan Defrates: Secret Agent is about a young spy with a whole lot to learn, who is paired with a very unlikely partner... his mom!

programme.title: Tom' s Car Wash
programme.desc: Tom loves caring for his friends they can always count on Tom to tow them back to his car wash, where they' re guaranteed to leave sparking!

programme.title: Everybody Loves a Moose
programme.desc: An oddball buddy series between an over ambitious boy, Jack and his pal Moose, a melodramatic self-confessed expert in everything. Except he isn' t! Despite his best intentions, he always messes up and although Jack may not get what he want, you can' t help being sucked in by Moose' s relentless optimism and zest for life!

programme.title: Grojband
programme.desc: The story about 12 year old Corey that emotionally torments his sister so that she will write the ultimate lyrics for his garage band.

programme.title: Eliot Kid
programme.desc: When a tooth falling out turns into a hunt for the “giant mouse”, when the city's sewers transform into Indiana Jones' white rapids or when a trip to the toilets becomes an expedition to a haunted house, well then you've entered the wonderful world of Eliot Kid!

programme.title: Princess Play Time
programme.desc: The proud Princess likes to do things her own way, but her antics are always joined by her restless brother, Prince, who tends to turn everything topsy-turvy. Any playtime in their room transforms into a fantastic journey through unusual worlds: the children arrange a picnic on the Moon, conduct a detective investigation in a toy city, or search for pirate treasures on islands! Although initially, the Princess and Prince seem to clash and compete, by the end, they always find joy in each other' s company and that of their cherished dog, Bona.

programme.title: Box Yourself
programme.desc: Great Projects From Ordinary Cardboard!

programme.title: Angry Birds Toons
programme.desc: Check out Angry Birds Toons compilations! Each compilation has several episodes from your favorite shows including Angry Birds, Piggy Tales, and Stella!

programme.title: Pumpkin Reports
programme.desc: Max Green's new brother and sister are aliens sent to Earth as the advance party for an invasion - and he's the only one who can stop them turning humans into unwilling slave-gardeners.

programme.title: Simba The Lion King
programme.desc: The Lion King is shot by poachers, as part of Shere Khan the Bengal tiger's plot to overthrow the king from his throne. Young Simba, son of the Lion King, suspects something strange and subconsciously senses that the Tiger will one day be his greatest enemy. Simba and his two sisters are adopted into a wolf pack.

programme.title: Robinhood
programme.desc: Robin's house was burned to ashes by the order of Alwyn, the Baron of Nottingham. Robin and his cousins Will, Winifred and Jenny flee into Sherwood Forest, hoping to escape persecution. They end up encountering a group of bandits led by Little John, who dubs himself as Big John during the beginning of the series, until Robin pokes fun renaming him "Little John" for playing with a cat.

programme.title: Crazy Candies
programme.desc: Dream is the source of Power.It inspires people with their vision of a beautiful and bright future.In the midst of ordinary life in Magic Dream Jar,the extraordinary happens because of Marshyo and his best friend Jacky.

programme.title: Bablu Dablu Cubs
programme.desc: An evil logger, Lakkha, tries to turn a forest into his personal lumberyard. However, two bear brothers, Bablu and Dablu, set out to thwart his efforts and have many adventures while doing so.

programme.title: Kungfu Master Of Zodiac
programme.desc: Welcome to 12 Zodiac Way! This is a story of the twelve animals of the Chinese Zodiac like you've never seen them before! Come journey with us to a charming little town called Fortune Valley, where the twelve animal-totems now associated with the Chinese lunar calendar spend their days frolicking merrily, often joining together to pursue a host of colorful projects and plans.

programme.title: Put your car on TV
programme.sub-title: Chevy Camaro vs Mercedes SLS AMG
programme.desc: Hosts Mylene Gomera and Saif Hattawi invite petrol heads from the Middle East to bring their tuned cars to the 'The Walk' at Jumeirah Beach and have it rated in the categories speed, style and sound. Whoever receives the most points, wins a one night stay for two people at this glamorous Sofitel Dubai Jumeirah Beach. On this episode, a Chevrolet Camaro and Mercedes SLS AMG try to impress.

programme.title: Put your car on TV
programme.desc: If you want to see out-of-this-world, customized or tuned luxury vehicles or posh cars you need to go to 'The Walk', the glamorous boulevard of Jumeirah Beach. Put Your Car on TV invites car owners to have their vehicles judged by Saif Hattawi. The person with the most points wins a special treat from the Sofitel Dubai Jumeirah Beach. Among the presented cars are a BMW X5 and a Mercedes SLK 230.

programme.title: Put your car on TV
programme.desc: People from the Middle East are crazy about their cars. On Put Your Car on TV they have the chance to present their tuned vehicles and judged. They are awarded points based on speed, style and sound and the car owner with the most points, wins a special treat for two from the Sofitel Dubai Jumeirah Beach. Among the competitors are a Nova SS, a special Honda Acord and a car full of crystals.

programme.title: Perfect Ride
programme.desc: Eager to overcome the damage to their image following the diesel scandal, Volkswagen allowed exclusive sneak peaks into future developments. We took their T-Cross on a covered drive. In addition: a first glance at Audi's A1 and A6 models.

programme.title: Perfect Ride
programme.desc: We compared the Ford Mustang 2.3 EcoBoost turbo to BMW's 430i with similar engine and drive specs. Also: Lada tries to take on Dacia with their Vesta SW station wagon. And: Opel's Grandland X may be an SUV, but it doesn't offer an all-wheel drive.

programme.title: Perfect Ride
programme.desc: Is Kia's visually exciting Stinger able to convince in our test? In addition: we explored how Subaru's Boxer engine concept works in their XV model. And: Hyundai i30N vs. Volkswagen Golf GTI.

programme.title: India: Marvels & Mysteries With William Dalrymple
programme.desc: The host, William Dalrymple, travels across India to understand its civilisation.

programme.title: Regiment Diaries
programme.desc: The Indian Army is an emotion – a living chronicle of events, that we have the luxury to forget because they remember. The army itself is a family of several regiments, each of which has its own history, identity, and glorious traditions. Regiment Diaries is a tale of the Indian Army unlike any told before. Told by the very men who follow the illustrious feats of their predecessors, it tells timeless tales that warm the heart, moisten the eye, and leave you in awe of the bravest children of India.

programme.title: Sharanam
programme.desc: Sharanam takes viewers on a poignant journey to some of the most revered pilgrimage sites in India to and highlights the traditions, practices, rituals and ideals that bring people to these holy places in search of something greater than themselves. Narrated by Bollywood actress Juhi Chawla, Sharanam showcases testimonies of personal incidents that are the bedrock of the belief, and follows the strong thread of faith that not only binds the pilgrims to their Gods, but also the nation with itself.

programme.title: Epic Ke Dus
programme.desc: Epic Ke Dus is a halfhour collated list of the top ten people, places or events of a chosen topic, examples of which include rivalries, thinkers and warriors. Each topic has been thoroughly researched and a panel of experts on the subject has carefully selected the stories that are fitting to be part of the topic. This panel is seen on the episodes giving their views on the events, the significance of the event and describing the mood of the era, publics reaction to these events and how it contributed to change the course of Indian history.

programme.title: Bharat Ratna The Jewels Of India
programme.desc: Bharat Ratna The Jewels of India is a show that celebrates the recipients of India's highest civilian honour. Through the medium of graphics and information, the show, intends to exhibit hidden unknown and loved stories from lives of these legendary characters.

programme.title: Safarnama
programme.desc: Safarnama is more than just a mere journey one wants to complete just to check out that one task from the ‘ToDo List”. It is something just one of its kind. In Safarnama, we are up for a soulfulfilling journey with Ankit Siwach that is to begin in Mumbai and cease at Ladakh. This journey is to witness numerous unseen moments and unfelt experiences via a thrilling, adventurous route. It isn't just about navigating roads using GPS but more of digging deeper into the beauty of India to understand life better.

programme.title: The Way Back Home
programme.desc: Rohan Thakur finds his true calling as he begins a journey to revisit his roots in Himachal Pradesh. Way Back Home is as much a travelogue of childhood, as of growing up. Get ready for a journey of a lifetime

programme.title: Mid
programme.desc: Veteran actor, Naseeruddin Shah, explores the many untold stories of Indian cricket. He recalls the history of the game match highlights. Sportsmanship, stadiums, hits and misses, and many more. In his unique narrative style, Naseeruddin Shah brings alive the humorous side of the game, along with undocumented anecdotes and quirky trivia. The show also features many personalities who narrate cricketing experiences and stories including Shashi Tharoor, Narl Contractor, Bishan Singh Bedi and Charu Sharma amongst others

programme.title: Lost Recipes
programme.desc: Lost Recipes is all about the food which is diffused into the pages of history and the rediscovery of a tradition that once was. Our host Aditya Bal is on a quest to unearth the once-popular culinary traditions through thirteen regions in India.But these recipes are no longer found in cookbooks, old or new, and seem to have evolved with time. Aditya must turn back the clock and wade through folk and lore to find the original, Lost Recipes.

programme.title: Tyohaar Ki Thaali
programme.desc: Sakshi Tanwar in Tyohaar Ki Thaali decides to celebrate one festival a week and along with the celebration, she also prepares two dishes from her mom's diary which is her prized possession. Along with preparing the dishes she also reminisces into the moments of how she celebrated some festivals and also shares some stories about the Gods.

programme.title: Regiment Diaries
programme.desc: The Indian Army is an emotion – a living chronicle of events, that we have the luxury to forget because they remember. The army itself is a family of several regiments, each of which has its own history, identity, and glorious traditions. Regiment Diaries is a tale of the Indian Army unlike any told before. Told by the very men who follow the illustrious feats of their predecessors, it tells timeless tales that warm the heart, moisten the eye, and leave you in awe of the bravest children of India.

programme.title: Wild Walk

programme.title: Wild Walk

programme.title: Wild Walk

programme.title: Modern Migrations
programme.desc: The technique to capture wildebeest and zebra involves an experienced team, a helicopter and favourable weather conditions! The helicopter pilot drives the herd straight into the funnel, directly into the vehicles...and on their way to a new home.

programme.title: Modern Migrations
programme.desc: When the animal you need to capture has a very long neck and standing almost 5 meters high, and able to spot you a mile away, you need to adapt your strategy dramatically.

programme.title: Modern Migrations
programme.desc: The capture team is busy in Ithala Game Reserve where several warthogs need new pastures. Meanwhile an interesting small animal, called a “dassie' or rock hyrax is lured into traps as they are becoming a menace in the Ntshondwe camp area.

programme.title: Modern Migrations

programme.title: Would You Enter a Snake Infested Forest?
programme.desc: Would you dare enter a forest crawling with snakes? Coyote ventures into one of the world's densest snake habitats to test courage and caution.It's frog vs turtle in a race to the water. Coyote hosts this hilarious and chaotic showdown between a leaping frogman and a speedy cooter.

programme.title: Cutest Baby Rhino Ever!
programme.desc: The baby rhino may be adorable, but it still has wild instincts. Coyote bonds with one in a rescue center and learns about their conservation.What's the smallest chameleon in the world? Coyote discovers just how tiny it really is—and how it avoids being noticed in the wild.

programme.title: Would You Enter the Dragon Infested Island?!
programme.desc: Would you explore an island crawling with giant reptiles? Coyote does, facing huge dragons, rough terrain, and epic surprises.Something from the deep clamps onto Mark. In this spine-tingling episode, he's bitten by a mysterious deep-sea creature.

programme.title: Abandoned Island! – Can We Survive 24 Hours?
programme.desc: Can Coyote and his team survive 24 hours on an abandoned island? With no supplies, the wilderness becomes both home and threat.

programme.title: Rattlesnake Rattle – You Won't Believe What's Inside!
programme.desc: What's inside a rattlesnake's rattle? Coyote carefully dissects one to reveal the anatomy and how this iconic warning system actually works.Coyote goes in search of the elusive golden trout, a rare species featured in video games and high-altitude streams alike. Will he catch one?

programme.title: Giant Frog Kissed! – Prince or Princess?
programme.desc: In a fairytale-worthy twist, Coyote kisses a giant frog in the name of science and fun. Does it turn into royalty? You'll have to see.A sobering episode recounts a fatal snake bite case. Coyote shares what went wrong and what to do in the event of a venomous encounter.

programme.title: HUNGRY LIKE A WOLF
programme.desc: Watch as Coyote and his team feed a deer to wolves in the wild. The episode captures predator instincts, teamwork, and the raw power of nature.

programme.title: Making a Crabby Tide Pool Aquarium in New England!
programme.desc: Mark builds a tide pool aquarium along the New England coast and fills it with crabs and marine critters. It's hands-on science at its best.The vampire fish lives up to its name. Coyote gets bitten and shows the terrifying teeth and feeding behavior of this river predator.

programme.title: Milking the World's Most Venomous Spider!
programme.desc: Coyote attempts to milk the world's most venomous spider in a high-stakes episode filled with fangs, silk, and scientific precision.With panda-like fuzz and a sting that ranks among the worst, this ant is no pushover. Mark explains what makes the panda ant so formidable.

programme.title: The Dire Wolf Is Alive – Extinction Reversed?
programme.desc: Could dire wolves still roam Earth? Fossil findings and modern sightings are explored in this thrilling, speculative episode.In one of his wildest challenges ever, Coyote dives into an unpredictable stunt. He calls it the craziest thing he's ever done—and he means it.

programme.title: Attacked by Bloodsucking Parasites!
programme.desc: Bloodsucking bugs go on the attack! Coyote lets these parasites bite in real time to show how fast they latch and how to stop them.The echidna looks cute, but its spikes say otherwise. Mark handles this spiny Australian mammal and explains its strange biology.

programme.title: Step Inside a Volcano!
programme.desc: Mark steps into an actual volcano! With heat, gases, and lava rock all around, this geology-heavy episode explores Earth's fiery power firsthand.The giant catfish is a powerhouse predator. Coyote takes a bite and breaks down how these fish use their strength to dominate waterways.

programme.title: I Caught a 300lb River Monster!
programme.desc: A legendary catch! Coyote reels in a 300-pound river monster and showcases the sheer strength and survival of this freshwater beast.This slime isn't alien—it's animal. But which one made it? Coyote follows the trail to uncover a gooey mystery.

programme.title: We Found Rare T‑Rex Teeth!

programme.title: Kia Sportage Exterior Design in Lunar Silver
programme.desc: A number of new technologies optimize the precision and control of the chassis in a wide variety of weather and road conditions. The standard electronic damper control (Electronic Control Suspension, ECS) in the GT-line version increases comfort and safety thanks to the continuous damping control. The system reacts to body movements and steering inputs and changes the damping behavior at lightning speed in order to counteract the vehicle's diving, pitching and rolling movements when cornering. It also adjusts the damping force in the case of obstacles in order to cope with them as comfortably as possible and to reduce the influence of post-vibrations on the wheels. A premiere for the Sportage is the “All-Terrain-Mode”, which will be available for the plug-in hybrid version with all-wheel drive. The system offers intelligent support when driving off-road or on snow by automatically optimizing the vehicle settings depending on the selected mode and thus helping the SUV to achieve maximum traction on muddy, sandy or snowy surfaces.

programme.title: The new Mercedes-Benz GLC AMG Line World Premiere Teaser
programme.desc: The new GLC is immediately recognisable as a member of the Mercedes-Benz SUV family. Standard equipment includes the AVANTGARDE exterior with Chrome package including chrome window surrounds and a new, chrome-look simulated underguard. This adds striking design features and enhances the unique proportions of the vehicle. One of the defining design highlights of the GLC is the redesigned front end, with headlamps that connect directly to the radiator grille to emphasise the vehicle's width, and the new radiator grille as part of the standard AVANTGARDE exterior, which now has a chrome surround and a sporty louvre in matt grey with chrome trim. The AMG Line has a radiator grille with Mercedes-Benz pattern. The body design is characterised by a full, spanned surface design enriched with precisely shaped edges in the sides. These emphasise the proportions, accentuate the muscular wheel arches and create a balance between elegance and off-road performance. Wheel arch liners in the vehicle colour are available from the AMG Line upwards for the first time. These accentuate the sportiness of the AMG Line, as optional equipment in conjunction with mixed tyres. Also available as an optional extra are easy-entry running boards and, from the AMG Line upwards, a Night package.

programme.title: MINI Challenge 2022
programme.desc: The one-make championship, organized by MINI Italia with the support of ACI Sport, is ready to kick off the eleventh season. This year there are three categories that compete on the tracks of the main Italian circuits, in six exciting events from 2 July to 23 October 2022. San Donato Milanese. Now in its eleventh consecutive edition, the MINI Challenge 2022 single-make championship warms up its engines to start a season full of challenges. Also this year, MINI Italia renews its commitment to organizing one of the most exciting competitions on the Italian scene. Passion, challenge, community and the art of performance are among the values of the famous championship signed by the iconic premium brand with a sporting DNA. The six events of 2022 will see the drivers compete on the tracks of the most famous national circuits. The MINI John Cooper Works Challenge Lite, the MINI John Cooper Works Challenge Pro and the MINI John Cooper Works Challenge Evo are ready to challenge each other in a new season full of emotions. The Academy race category continues in 2022, which also sees the under 25s on the track, as part of the MINI program dedicated to young people.

programme.title: The Mercedes EQS SUV Electric Art Line Driving Video
programme.desc: With the luxury saloon EQS and the sporty executive saloon EQE, Mercedes-Benz has entered a new, all-electric era in the upper market segments as well. The EQS SUV, the third model series with this architecture developed for electric vehicles, will soon follow. The SUV offers plenty of space, comfort and connectivity for up to seven passengers in its avant-garde, luxurious interior. Thanks to powerful electric motors, responsive 4MATIC all-wheel drive and an intelligent OFFROAD driving mode, the EQS SUV is also capable of tackling light terrain with ease. The new EQS SUV shares the long wheelbase (3210 millimetres) with the EQS Saloon, but is over 20 centimetres higher. The dimensions in detail: 5125/1959/1718 millimetres (length/width/height). The interior dimensions benefit from these generous SUV dimensions and from the advantages of the purpose design tailored to the electric platform. The second row of seats can be electrically adjusted as standard. Up to four golf bags fit in the boot. A third row of seats with two additional individual seats and extensive comfort features for all passengers is available as an option.

programme.desc: Automotions

programme.title: Colour change with the power of thought
programme.sub-title: The BMW iX Flow meets neuro-technology
programme.desc: The Munich-based startup brainboost used the new and improved colour-changing effect in a one-off collaboration with the BMW Group at rad°hub aimed at raising awareness of mental health. With the help of brainboost, the BMW iX Flow was connected directly to the brain of the rad°hub delegates using an electroencephalograph (EEG), which records the brain's electrical activity. “The colour patterns of the BMW iX Flow react to brain activity and reflect the level of activity,” explains brainboost CEO Philipp Heiler. “Once the brain is at rest, the changes of patterns on the iX Flow also become calmer and more rhythmical.” A special animation was activated if delegates managed to maintain this state for several seconds. Thus, the participants were able to gradually calm and relax their brains under the guidance of the brainboost experts and with the help of neurofeedback via the iX Flow. This matures the knowledge of which strategies work best to specifically shut down one's own brain activity for relaxation, e.g. in everyday working life.

programme.title: Stellantis Spotlight March 18, 2022
programme.desc: "Stellantis Spotlight" is a weekly recap of some of the major stories at Stellantis. The top stories for the week ending May 27, 2022, include Carlos Tavares announces joint venture for a lithium-ion battery production plant in the U.S., the HEMI® Orange appearance comes to the Dodge Durango lineup and our Veterans Business Resource Group will participate in the Dearborn Memorial Day Parade.

programme.title: Wellbeing behind the wheel – The new Bentley Azure Range
programme.desc: To celebrate the arrival of the new Bentayga EWB, an exclusive First Edition is now available. Subject to a limited production run for the first twelve months of orders, it combines many of the most desirable options available for the car with a package of eye-catching details found only on Bentley First Editions. First Edition badging can be seen to the exterior of the car – a theme that extends inside, with badging on the veneered fascia, as well as embroidery on the seats. Unique First Edition contrast stitching and embroidery adorns the seats and, depending on the choice of veneers, handcrafted metal overlays just 0.075 mm thick can be applied to the fascia and waistrails in the front and the rear door veneer. The First Edition offers elegant and timeless design, focusing on maximum comfort and well-being. This specifically tailored specification includes a unique 22” ten-spoke directional wheel and bright lower bumper grilles. Other additional features as standard include unique quilted seats, mood lighting, a heated steering wheel, and increased driver's assistance aids. Attention to detail is clear, from the badging that identifies the car to the jewelled caps on the fuel and oil fillers.

programme.title: The new Porsche 911 GT3 R
programme.desc: The turbocharged three-litre flat-six in the new 911 GTS delivers 353 kW (480 PS). Maximum torque is 570 Nm, an increase of 20 Nm over its predecessor. Zero to 100 km/h takes just 3.3 seconds (911 Carrera 4 GTS: Fuel consumption combined (NEDC) 10.5 – 9.7 l/100 km, Fuel consumption combined (WLTP) 11.4 – 10.6 l/100 km, CO₂ emissions combined (NEDC) 240 – 222 g/km, CO₂ emissions combined (WLTP) 259 – 240 g/km) in the 911 Carrera 4 GTS Coupé with the eight-speed Porsche dual-clutch transmission (PDK): three tenths faster than its predecessor. A seven-speed manual transmission with a particularly short throw is available for all 911 GTS models as an alternative to the PDK.

programme.title: From concept vehicle to full-production ID. Buzz
programme.sub-title: How was the electric Microbus created
programme.desc: The new model line's assistance systems perfect ease of driving and safety. Included as standard in the ID. Buzz and ID. Buzz Cargo is the ‘Car2X' local warning system, which utilises signals from other vehicles and the transport infrastructure to spot hazards in real time. Also included as standard: the ‘Front Assist' emergency braking function and, in the MPV, the ‘Lane Assist' lane-keeping assistant. With new software, new assistance functions are also making their way into the ID. family. Available as an option is ‘Travel Assist with swarm data', which facilitates partially automated driving across the entire speed range and, for the first time, assisted lane-changing on the motorway. Also new: the ‘Memory Function' for automated parking on a previously saved route.

programme.title: New 2023 Range Rover Sport Design Reveal Film
programme.desc: The New Range Rover Sport has made its global premiere with a dramatic world-first climb up a flooded dam spillway in Iceland. The epic ascent saw New Range Rover Sport resist the surging torrent of water flowing down the ramp of the Karahnjukar Dam – the biggest of its kind in the world – at a rate of 750 tonnes per minute. A loss of traction risked plunging down the perilous 90m drop at the base of the spillway to the valley floor below. The successful spillway ascent was screened for the first time at an exclusive launch event at Jaguar Land Rover's Advanced Product Creation Centre at Gaydon, UK. Official James Bond stunt driver Jessica Hawkins was behind the wheel as the New Range Rover Sport demonstrated its grip, traction, performance and composure, completing the latest in a series of challenges for Land Rover's luxury performance SUV. Previous feats include a record-setting hill-climb at Pikes Peak, a first recorded crossing of the ‘Empty Quarter' desert in the Arabian Peninsula and a first ascent of the 999 steps to Heaven's Gate in China, in 2018.

programme.title: Hispano Suiza showcases its history in the Peralada Castle Museum
programme.desc: The history of Hispano Suiza is showcased, for the very first time, in the Peralada Castle Museum (Girona, Spain) where visitors will be able to contemplate the past and present of the legendary car brand founded in 1904 by Damián Mateu and Mark Birkigt. The Hispano Suiza Room will close the usual tour of the Peralada Castle Museum. After years of researching to gather the largest number of pieces and objects related to its history, Hispano Suiza becomes part of this important collection. The Hispano Suiza exhibition encompasses a journey through various decades: from the beginning of the 20th century, when Hispano Suiza was founded, to the present day. After passing through a luxurious hall, the public will be able to visit a recreation of the offices of Damián Mateu and Mark Birkigt, where countless business and technical ideas, emerged and took shape, turning Hispano Suiza into a point of reference, for luxury, comfort and technical solutions. In this area, the original painting 'Dame with a mink' by Ramon Casas takes pride of place: it was used as an illustration on the company's original shares.

programme.desc: Digital Matrix LED and digital OLED technology in the new Audi A8 L Animation

programme.title: TechDay Digital Light
programme.desc: Safety and customer satisfaction come first at Audi. They are part and parcel of the success of the company with the four rings. In that context, light technology is steadily growing more important and creating a wider range of possibilities and perspectives, from added safety for the driver, to external communication and individualization. Systematic light digitization is making all of this possible. It is particularly visible in the new Audi A8: the forward-looking Digital Matrix LED headlights and digital OLED rear lights raise the customer experience to a whole new level: for the first time in any Audi model, light is completely digitized. The car can be individualized even further through its digital OLED rear lights. The Digital Matrix LED headlights also include three new functions: advanced traffic information, a lane light with direction indicator lights on highways, and an orientation light on country roads. These features not only demonstrate Audi's “Vorsprung durch Technik,” they also add value.

programme.title: 2022 Peugeot 308
programme.desc: The sixth generation Opel/Vauxhall Astra and third generation Peugeot 308 are both based on the Stellantis EMP2 platform and, unsurprisingly, score very similarly across all four areas of assessment. Both the offset test and the full-width crash test highlighted marginal chest injury protection for average male and small female drivers, and neither car was equipped with a centre airbag for far-side crash protection, a countermeasure which is increasingly common on modern cars. Both cars offer plenty of crash avoidance technology but do not include some of the latest advancements introduced in the market. The cars' four-star ratings apply also to their PHEV variants.

programme.desc: An amazing beachfront property is what Inez's couple is looking for & these top million dollar agents are sure to surpass their expectations. Inez's client currently lives in a condo & have one child, however, they desire a home that they can comfortably expand their family in.

programme.title: Accidental Chef
programme.desc: Melvyn arrives in Cambodia this week. Melvyn is first invited to dine with a privileged family. In their mansion, Melvyn feasts on one of the most unusual things he's ever experienced - ant's eggs!

programme.title: Accidental Chef
programme.desc: Melvyn's culinary journey culminates to a homecoming this week- Singapore. In this city where he grew up, Melvyn hopes to rediscover the history and culture through two very important groups of Singaporeans- the Peranakans and the Eurasians. They represent the multi-ethnic past and present of the nation.

programme.title: Luxury Life

programme.title: Luxury Life
programme.desc: In this episode we look at luxury in China, the museums of the future, the all new Land Rover, fashion designer Alicia Lee, Kabuki spectacle at the Bellagio in Las Vegas.

programme.title: Finest Homes

programme.title: Ellis Family Vacation
programme.desc: The Ellis Family checks out Birmingham, Alabama, ground zero of the Civil Rights Movement, visiting museums, monuments, and locations that helped end segregation in the United States.

programme.title: Soul of The South
programme.desc: Join writer and photographer Johny Pitts as he journeys along the Civil Rights Trail through the American South. From Tennessee to Mississippi to Alabama, discover the people and the places, the music, food, and culture, linked to this pivotal period in world history.

programme.title: Paul & Nicks Big American Food Trip
programme.desc: Paul and Nick meet with Colin Brooks of the 1718 project, founded to investigate the historical links between Ulster, Scotland and Philadelphia. They also cook for Randall Redman, who claims to be able to trace his ancestry to Robert The Bruce.

programme.title: Paul & Nicks Big American Food Trip
programme.desc: Philadelphia was one of the main entry ports for immigrants to America in the 18th century. Paul and Nick meet Drew McGinty and Joyce Alexander, the founder of the Center for Ulster-Scots Studies. Our chefs try to cook an Ulster-Scots meal, but keep being seduced by Italian fare.
